smokeApprovals.title: Cardiologist Appointment — March 3rd, 2pm
smokeApprovals.description: Dr. Sarah Chen, Cardiology Associates. Covered by your insurance (BlueCross). Annual heart health check — flagged as overdue based on biometric trend. Intro email drafted.
smokeApprovals.sheldonNote: Your resting HR has elevated 4bpm over 6 weeks. This is not optional.

smokeApprovals.title: CNS Recovery Day — Cancel Thursday Workout
smokeApprovals.description: HRV reading of 44ms is 12 points below your 30-day baseline. A high-intensity session today will extend recovery deficit into the weekend, impacting Sunday performance review.
smokeApprovals.calendarImpact: Removes Thursday 6am training block, adds active recovery walk
smokeApprovals.sheldonNote: This is not a suggestion. Your body is in debt. Rest is the optimal move.

smokeApprovals.title: Eliminate Post-7pm Carbohydrates — 14-Day Trial
smokeApprovals.description: Correlation found: your deep sleep percentage drops 4.2% on nights with late-carb intake. The intervention is low-friction and reversible. 14-day trial to confirm causation.
smokeApprovals.dataSource: Oura sleep stages + meal log cross-reference
smokeApprovals.sheldonNote: I ran the numbers. The pasta is the problem.

smokeApprovals.title: Weekly Decompression Block — Friday 4–5pm
smokeApprovals.description: Stress markers have been elevated Tuesday through Thursday for 3 consecutive weeks. A protected end-of-week wind-down block correlates with 18% better decision quality the following Monday.
smokeApprovals.calendarImpact: Recurring Friday 4–5pm block — no meetings allowed
smokeApprovals.sheldonNote: You keep working through this window. That is why Monday is slow.

smokeApprovals.title: Block Stackz's 9am All-Hands — Recovery Incomplete
smokeApprovals.description: You had 5.8hrs of sleep last night with poor sleep stage distribution. Stackz wants a 9am all-hands for 90 minutes. I recommend a 30-minute check-in at 11am instead.
smokeApprovals.calendarImpact: Pushes all-hands to 11am, duration reduced to 30min

smokeApprovals.title: Therapy Intake — High-Performance Anxiety Specialist
smokeApprovals.description: Found Dr. Marcus Webb, specializes in founder performance psychology. First session is covered. You mentioned feeling scattered last week — I took notes.
smokeApprovals.sheldonNote: Approved previously. Session confirmed for March 1st.

stackzApprovals.title: LinkedIn Content Blitz — 5 Posts This Week
stackzApprovals.description: Megaphone drafted a 5-post LinkedIn series targeting the B2B SaaS segment. Based on last month's content data, this format drove 340 profile visits per post on average. We need volume now.

stackzApprovals.title: Upgrade to Node 20 LTS — This Sprint
stackzApprovals.description: Forge flagged 3 performance regressions tied to Node 18 runtime. Upgrade path is clean — Tester confirmed no breaking changes in staging. Delay = continued degraded API response times.

stackzApprovals.title: Cancel 3 Unused SaaS Subscriptions — $147/mo
stackzApprovals.description: Cashflow audited our tool stack. Identified Loom ($12), an unused Figma seat ($25), and a design asset subscription ($110). Nobody's touched them in 60+ days. Clean cut.

stackzApprovals.title: NexaCore — Pivot to B2B from B2C
stackzApprovals.description: Founder's post-mortem data shows B2C CAC is 4.2x higher than projected. B2B equivalent revenue requires 80% fewer customers. Strategist has a 30-day pivot playbook ready.
stackzApprovals.estimatedImpact: Extends runway 4 months, restructures revenue model

stackzApprovals.title: New Onboarding Flow Design — Ready for Dev Handoff
stackzApprovals.description: Canvas completed the redesign. Reduced onboarding from 9 steps to 5. Forge's team is ready to build. Current onboarding has 34% drop-off at step 3. This fixes it.

stackzApprovals.title: Paid Ad Spend Increase — $500 → $1,200/day
stackzApprovals.description: Current ROAS is 3.8x on LinkedIn. Scout identified 2 new audience segments with projected 4.5x ROAS. Scout and Ghost have assets ready. We scale now while CPMs are low.

stackzApprovals.title: Zapier Integration — Ship by March 1st
stackzApprovals.description: Integrator has 90% done. Forge reviewed — 1 auth edge case to solve, est. 4hrs. 47 beta users requested this. Shipping it unlocks the mid-market segment.
stackzApprovals.outcome: Shipped March 1st. 31 of 47 beta users upgraded within 48hrs.
